name: Volcano Agent SDK
what_it_does: A TypeScript SDK for building AI agents that combine LLM reasoning with real-world actions via MCP tools, supporting automatic tool selection, multi-agent coordination, parallel execution, streaming, and multi-provider LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Bedrock, etc.).
use_cases: Building production-grade TypeScript AI agents with automatic MCP tool orchestration
Hierarchical multi-agent systems where a coordinator delegates to specialized sub-agents
Streaming agentic workflows for real-time chat interfaces using Server-Sent Events
Observable AI pipelines with OpenTelemetry tracing exported to Jaeger, DataDog, or Prometheus
not_for: Simple single-tool LLM integrations that don't need orchestration complexity
Users who want a managed cloud agent platform rather than an SDK
best_when: You are building a TypeScript/Node.js backend and want full control over multi-step agent workflows with MCP tool integration and production observability baked in.
avoid_when: Your team is Python-first, or you need a no-code/low-code agent builder — look at LangChain, LlamaIndex, or cloud agent platforms instead.

auth.notes: API keys required for each LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.); OAuth available for MCP tool authentication.

pricing.estimated_workload_costs: SDK is free; LLM provider costs vary by usage and provider choice.
pricing.notes: Apache 2.0 licensed. LLM inference costs are the primary expense.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: TypeScript type safety helps surface errors at compile time; runtime error messages are adequate.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Automatic retry support built in; idempotency depends on underlying MCP tool implementations.
known_agent_gotchas: MCP tool endpoints must be HTTP-accessible; local stdio MCP servers require wrapping
Each LLM provider has its own API key management — no unified credential store
Multi-agent coordination requires careful prompt design to prevent delegation loops
Streaming SSE requires proper connection handling in production environments
